ItacPersonItem.Notes: Scapinelli received a doctorate in Philosophy from the University of Bologna in 1609. In 1611he was appointed Lector of Logic in the Bolognese Studio. See his biography by Girolamo Tiraboschi in Biblioteca modenese, vol. 5 (1784).
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
